templates.name: Newsletter Welcome Email
templates.subject: Thanks for joining SetVenue
templates.previewText: Here's what to expect from your newsletter subscription.

body.headline: Thanks for joining — here's what to expect
body.intro: You're on the list for new locations, exclusive deals, and occasional production tips from SetVenue.

sections.title: How to browse
sections.content: Use the marketplace to compare locations, crew stays, and event venues. Filter by city, type, price, or production need. Start with featured listings for standout options.

sections.title: How to list
sections.content: If you have a property to offer, use the List Your Property page to submit the basics. SetVenue is built for hosts who want clear expectations and quality bookings — with 0% host fees.

sections.title: FAQ
sections.content: Need more detail first? Visit the FAQ for booking flow, privacy tiers, and host requirements.

body.footer: We do not sell your email. You can update preferences or unsubscribe in one click at any time.

templates.name: Cold Outreach — Property Owner
templates.subject: Production companies are looking for spaces in {{city}}
templates.subject_b: Your property + film productions = easy money
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I found your property at {{property_address}} and thought it could be a great fit for film productions, photo shoots, and events in {{city}}.

I run SetVenue — a marketplace connecting property owners with production companies looking for unique spaces.

How it works:

- You set your own price and keep 100% of it
- We charge the renter a 10% booking fee — not you
- Production bookings typically pay 2-5x more than vacation rentals
- Shoots are usually daytime only — less wear and tear than overnight guests

For context: Giggster, the biggest competitor, takes 15–25% from owners. We take 0%.

We're onboarding our first 500 properties for free — 6 months, no strings. After that, standard pricing kicks in.

Takes 10 minutes: setvenue.com/free-listing

Or just reply here and I'll set it up for you.

Josh Feuer
Founder, SetVenue

templates.name: Cold Outreach — Real Estate Agent
templates.subject: Quick question about your {{city}} property clients
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I'm reaching out because you work with property owners in {{city}} and some of them could be earning extra income from their spaces without lifting a finger.

I run SetVenue — a marketplace where film productions, photographers, and event companies book unique properties for shoots.

For your clients:

- They set their price, keep 100%
- We charge the renter, not the owner
- Production bookings pay 2-5x vacation rental rates
- Free listing for the first 500 properties (6 months)

Homes, warehouses, lofts, estates, commercial spaces — if it photographs well, production companies want it.

Would a 10-minute call make sense? Happy to explain how agent referrals work.

Josh Feuer
Founder, SetVenue
setvenue.com/free-listing

templates.name: Cold Outreach — Property Management Company
templates.subject: Your properties could be earning between shoots
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I run SetVenue — a marketplace where film productions, photographers, and event companies book properties for shoots and events.

I'm reaching out because {{company}} manages properties in {{city}} that look like they'd be a great fit for production bookings. This isn't a replacement for long-term rentals — it's extra revenue from days properties would otherwise sit empty.

How it works:

- You list properties in 10 minutes each
- You set the price, keep 100% of it
- We charge the renter a 10% booking fee — you pay nothing
- We handle the booking, payment, and communication

We're onboarding our first 500 properties for free (6 months, no strings). One company with 30 properties could fill a big chunk of that.

Most competitors charge owners 15-25%. We charge 0%.

15-minute call this week? I can walk you through how other management companies are using us.

Josh Feuer
Founder, SetVenue
setvenue.com/free-listing

templates.name: Cold Outreach — Airbnb/VRBO Host
templates.subject: Another channel for your {{city}} property — no extra work
templates.subject_b: Production companies pay 3x Airbnb rates — interested?
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I noticed your listing on {{platform}} and your property looks incredible — exactly the kind of space film productions and photographers are looking for.

I run SetVenue. We're like Airbnb but specifically for production companies, photo shoots, and events. You're already set up for short-term rentals, so this is just an additional revenue stream with zero extra setup.

Why hosts love it:

- Production bookings pay 2-5x more than vacation rentals
- They're usually daytime only (no overnight wear and tear)
- You keep 100% of your price — we charge the renter, not you
- Your existing photos and description work as-is

We're giving our first 500 hosts free listings for 6 months. You're already doing the hard part on {{platform}} — this just puts your property in front of a completely different audience.

Takes 10 minutes: setvenue.com/free-listing

Worth a shot?

Josh Feuer
Founder, SetVenue

templates.name: Social Media DM
templates.body:
Hey {{name}} — your property at {{property_address}} looks perfect for film shoots and events.

I run SetVenue — production companies book unique spaces through us. You set your price, keep 100%. We charge the renter.

First 500 listings are free (6 months). Takes 10 min: setvenue.com/free-listing

Worth a look?

templates.name: Follow-Up #1 (3 days)
templates.subject: Did you see my note about {{property_address}}?
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Just following up on my note about listing {{property_address}} on SetVenue.

Quick version: production companies pay 2-5x vacation rental rates for unique spaces. You set your price, keep all of it. We charge the renter.

We've filled {{spots_taken}} of our 500 free spots. No pressure — just didn't want you to miss it if it got buried.

setvenue.com/free-listing

Happy to answer any questions.

Josh

templates.name: Follow-Up #2 (7 days, last chance)
templates.subject: Last chance — free listings closing soon
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Last note from me — I don't want to clutter your inbox.

We're close to filling our 500 free listings on SetVenue. After that, standard pricing kicks in.

Right now it's genuinely free — no credit card, no commitment, 6 months. If {{city}} productions are booking in your area, your property could be earning from shoots you'd otherwise never know about.

setvenue.com/free-listing

If now's not the right time, no worries. But the free window is closing.

Thanks for your time.

Josh Feuer
SetVenue
